name: @my-platform/workspace
description: Unified management workspace for the MY applications and services.

scripts.install:migration: npm ci --prefix services/campus-service --no-audit --no-fund && npm ci --prefix services/iot-service --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.check:website: node --check apps/official-website/main.js && npm --prefix apps/official-website run build && node scripts/check-official-website-build.mjs
scripts.check:workspace-scripts: node --check scripts/audit-workspace.mjs && node --check scripts/install-workspace.mjs && node --test scripts/npm-command.test.mjs
scripts.check:packages: node --check packages/platform-auth/index.cjs && node --check packages/platform-auth/esm/index.mjs && node --check packages/platform-browser-runtime/index.js && node --test packages/platform-auth/test/service-request.test.cjs packages/platform-browser-runtime/test/runtime.test.mjs
scripts.check:release-runner: node --check scripts/deployment-runner.mjs && node --check scripts/release-workflow-callback.mjs && node --check scripts/buildx-metadata.mjs && node --check scripts/configure-deployment-sidecar.mjs && node --test scripts/deployment-runner.test.mjs scripts/release-workflow-callback.test.mjs scripts/buildx-metadata.test.mjs scripts/configure-deployment-sidecar.test.mjs
scripts.check:mongodb-scripts: node --check scripts/mongodb-cli.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-mongodb-isolation.mjs && node --test scripts/mongodb-cli.test.mjs
scripts.check:gateway: node --check scripts/verify-platform-smoke.mjs && npm --prefix services/platform-api run check
scripts.check:admins: npm --prefix apps/core-admin run check && npm --prefix apps/exam-admin run check && node scripts/check-admin-performance.mjs
scripts.check:exam: npm --prefix services/exam-api run lint && node --test services/exam-api/test/*.test.js
scripts.check:iot: npm --prefix services/iot-service run check && npm --prefix services/iot-service test
scripts.check:miniapps: npm --prefix apps/exam-miniapp run check:miniprogram && npm --prefix apps/exam-miniapp run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/smart-campus-miniapp/miniprogram run check
scripts.check: npm run check:console && npm run check:website && npm run check:workspace-scripts && npm run check:packages && npm run check:release-runner && npm run check:backup-scripts && npm run check:mongodb-scripts && npm run check:supply-chain && npm run check:topology && npm run check:gateway && npm run check:admins && npm run check:core && npm run check:exam && npm run check:campus && npm run check:iot && npm run check:notification && npm run check:miniapps
scripts.check:backup-scripts: node --check scripts/backup-mongodb.mjs && node --check scripts/restore-mongodb.mjs && node --check scripts/backup-mongodb-container.mjs && node --check scripts/restore-mongodb-container.mjs && node --check scripts/backup-runner.mjs
scripts.compose:config: npm run env:check && docker compose --env-file .env -f infra/docker/compose.yml config --quiet
